## Description

Closes #(issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`cargo test`)
- [ ] Code is formatted (`cargo fmt --check`)
- [ ] Clippy is clean (`cargo clippy -- -D warnings`)
- [ ] PR references an existing issue
